title: [CK] Add support for large tensor index handling into conv bwd data WMMA
summary: Updates grouped convolution WMMA implementations and large-case tests so large tensor indices are handled in CK convolution forward/backward paths.

title: [hipblaslt][tensilelite] Add multicast tdm for subtile kernel
summary: Adds multicast TDM load support to TensileLite Subtile emission and kernel-writer paths, validated by the gfx1250 BF16 cluster YAML on B0 hardware per PR body.

title: [CK_TILE] Use launched block size for GEMM occupancy query

title: [CK Tile] MX GEMM kernel unification
summary: Moves separate MX GEMM implementations toward a unified CK Tile GEMM path, adding gfx950 support to the newer MX kernel and consolidating pipelines/tests.

title: [GFX1250][CK_TILE] Coalesce MX scale16 scale load
summary: Changes the gfx1250 MX scale16 descriptor and host pre-shuffle to make per-lane scale loads contiguous, matching the coalescing pattern already used by scale32.

title: [hipBLASLt] Fix int8 GEMM crash on alpha=1065353216
summary: Shares alpha/beta scalar extraction between Tensile problem construction/update paths so int8 GEMM accepts an int32 bit pattern representing float 1.0 without I

title: [tensilelite] Fix rocisa instruction mnemonics and add gfx12+ scalar ops
summary: Fixes rocisa mnemonic/version issues for transpose loads, removes an invalid scalar multiply mnemonic path, and adds wrappers for gfx12 scalar floating-point an

title: [hipblaslt][origami] Model changes for mi350P
summary: Adds MI350P-specific bandwidth constants and PCI chip-ID differentiation so Origami and TensileLite can route hipBLASLt solutions using the correct hardware mod

title: [tensilelite] Fix subtile PGR=0 WMMA-source WAR hazard on gfx1250
summary: Adjusts Subtile logical scheduling and wait-ALU insertion so expert scheduling no longer creates a WMMA-source WAR hazard in PGR=0 cases.

title: [origami] Subtile-aware heuristic: reject gfx950 BF16 TN subtile kernels for K<512 with large free dim

title: [CK DSL] gfx1250 unified attention, moe, topK, RopE kernel support.

title: [hipBLASLt] Overlap accum init (initD) with GR across all Subtile paths
summary: Emits initD in the Subtile preloop to overlap accumulator VGPR initialization with global reads, with special handling for PGR=0 and tail-only K<DepthU paths.

title: [CK DSL] conv heuristic: fix gemm_k_per_block, add K_per_C + log features, update all models to 101 features

title: [hipblaslt][tensilelite] Reorganize and expand coverage of GFX1250 StreamK tests
summary: Adds and reshapes gfx1250 Stream-K YAML suites so RDNA4 GEMM coverage includes quick, explicit, TDM, PAP, and extended cases for several data-type families.

title: [CK][CK DSL] Pass vector sizes as arguments for implicit gemm
summary: Passes vector sizes into CK DSL implicit-GEMM and manifest-runner paths instead of relying on unsafe fixed assumptions that could create too-large vectorization

title: Tune gfx1100 BBS GEMM kernels for Llama-3.1-8b-Instruct

title: [AIROCMLIR-798] Add LDS usage estimate CAPI function

summary: # [AMD/gfx950] FlyDSL kgather diagnostic backend for DSv4 sparse FP8 MLA decode

title: [PR 4/7] Multi-arch ROCm kernel support with runtime optimization

title: Fix Qwen MoE precision issue with PP and all-reduce fusion

title: [RL] MXFP8 flashinfer_trtllm_routed MoE for V4

title: [minimax-m3] Split 1/4: sparse attention ops + JIT kernels + config foundation

title: [AMD] Optimize o_proj gemm and attn output rope performance
summary: Routes selected DeepSeek-V4 FP8 projection GEMMs toward AITER CK blockscale kernels on gfx950/HIP 7.2+ and adds a specialized ROCm path for attention-output inv

title: [AMD][ROCm] Fix CI failures on gfx950, gfx1100, gfx1151, and gfx1201

title: MXFP4: Add GEMM kernel tuning and MXFP4Quantizer.copy()
summary: Adds CSV-based AITER MXFP4 GEMM config selection and fixes MXFP4Quantizer cloning behavior.

title: Full MXFP4 Training Recipe
summary: Introduces MXFP4 training support including fused cast+transpose with optional Hadamard, GEMM layout shuffling, AITER dispatch, and MXFP4 weight caching.

title: [TE] Improve backward performance for CK Tile FP8 Group GEMM
summary: Re-expresses WGRAD FP8 grouped GEMM operands using alternate columnwise storage to avoid an unfavorable CK transposed path.

title: [CI] Add aiter installation to CI image for MXFP4 FP4 GEMM kernels
summary: Updates TransformerEngine CI image setup to install AITER, enabling CI coverage for MXFP4/FP4 GEMM integration paths.

title: HipKittens MXFP8 GEMM Support
summary: Open PR adding a HipKittens-backed MXFP8 GEMM path that the PR author describes as gfx950-only and shape-constrained.

title: add MXFP8 pre-swizzling for gfx1250 GEMM
summary: Adds the original gfx1250 MXFP8 pre-swizzle machinery and extension plumbing before it was later cherry-picked to dev.

title: gfx1250 swizzle_xor changes for FP4
summary: Adjusts FP4 swizzle_xor code so the swizzle instructions build on gfx1250; PR notes no performance difference on gfx950.

title: CK Tile Group GEMM gfx1250
summary: Adds gfx1250/RDNA4 compatibility for CK Tile grouped GEMM paths and switches dependency plumbing for that branch.

title: CK Tile MXFP8 Group GEMM gfx1250
summary: Adds CK Tile MXFP8 grouped GEMM backend and tests for gfx1250 context, replacing an AITER dependency path with rocm-libraries for these changes.

title: NVFP4: Work around intermittent incorrect results for backward GEMMs
summary: Adds a workaround for intermittent incorrect NVFP4 backward GEMM results by routing affected cases away from the problematic path.

title: Fix CK FP8 grouped GEMM dtype gating for columnwise operands
summary: Corrects FP8 grouped-GEMM dtype gating after operand canonicalization and adds padding/specialization support.

title: Mxfp8 grouped and multi quantize
summary: Open PR adding grouped and multi MXFP8 quantize kernels, benchmark coverage, and refactoring of the ROCm quantize body.

title: add MXFP8 pre-swizzling for gfx1250 GEMM (#568)
summary: Adds gfx1250 MXFP8 GEMM scale pre-swizzling and production-like GEMM tests in ROCm TransformerEngine.

title: CK MXFP8 Group Gemm gfx1250 Enablement
summary: Adds CK MXFP8 grouped GEMM integration, gfx1250 runtime dispatch, scale preshuffle support, and C++ grouped MXFP8 tests.

title: [Fix] TE RMSNorm Triton Kernel Optimization
summary: Optimizes TransformerEngine's ROCm Triton RMSNorm kernel.

title: gfx1250 mxfp8 gemm: loosen restrictions on K
summary: Changes gfx1250 MXFP8 GEMM validation from stricter K assumptions toward K being a multiple of 32, per PR description.

title: gfx1250 mxfp8 gemm: add NN/NT transpose workaround
summary: Adds HIP transpose kernels and MXFP8 scale conversion helpers so NN/NT cases can be routed through supported layouts.

title: add dsv4 production mxfp8 gemm shapes
summary: Open PR adding DSV4 production MXFP8 GEMM shapes to C++ GEMM tests for the gfx1250/RDNA4 path.

title: [AMD] Restrict BlockPingPong scheduling for loop-variant masked loads
